codeReview.summary: The fix fully addresses the prior multipart binary-corruption finding: `parse_multipart` no longer coerces the full payload through UTF-8, header/body splitting now stays byte-oriented, and the new regression test proves non-UTF8 file-part bytes round-trip unchanged while the existing named-part scaffold test still covers the pre-existing helper contract.

summary: Reviewed the prior failure report, the fix feature entry/handoff/transcript skeleton, and commit ad94382. The original bug in `tests/support/multipart.rs` was the whole-body `String::from_utf8` conversion; the fix replaces that with byte-based boundary and header/body delimiter parsing, keeps header decoding scoped to header bytes, and adds `multipart_binary_parts_round_trip` in `tests/scaffold_harness.rs` to prove binary byte fidelity. I found no new blocking issues in scope for the multipart-corruption finding and no additional shared-state gaps.
